Project Documentation

All BABOK-aligned business analysis artefacts for this project — from initial BRD through to UAT sign-off. Each document translates technical findings into stakeholder-ready language.

// Artefacts

8 Docs
BRD 18 pages
Business Requirements Document
Defines business objectives, scope, stakeholder needs, KPIs, and acceptance criteria for the fraud detection system.
Complete
↗ View
FRD 14 pages
Functional Requirements Document
Translates BRD objectives into detailed system-level functional requirements — data inputs, model triggers, alert thresholds.
Complete
↗ GitHub ↗ View
STAKEHOLDER 6 pages
Stakeholder Analysis Matrix
RACI matrix mapping 12 stakeholders across Risk, Compliance, IT, and Operations with influence/interest grid.
Complete
↗ GitHub ↗ View
DATA DICT 8 pages
Data Dictionary
Column-level definitions for all 29 fields in account_data.csv — data type, source, valid range, and fraud relevance score.
Complete
↗ GitHub ↗ View
UAT 12 pages
UAT Test Plan
42 test scenarios covering model precision/recall thresholds, edge cases, and business rule validation for the flag engine.

Project Charter
Project scope, timeline, budget, constraints, assumptions, and sign-off matrix for the fraud detection initiative.
